disclaimer: Secure Portal - Official Government Access Only
select_role: Select Your Authorized Role to Continue
auth_warning_public: As a General Public user, this portal provides logical eligibility checking only. To formally claim benefits, please physically submit the required documents to the Divisional Secretariat (if Deceased was a pensioner) or the Last Working Place (if Deceased in active service).
auth_warning_headoffice: Head Office Administrative Mode active: Direct Central Authorization and Auditing overrides enabled.
err_global_format: Format Error: Please review the RED bordered fields to resolve structural errors before proceeding.
err_invalid_lifecycle: Invalid Life Cycle: Death date cannot be physically recorded prior to the birth date.
err_statutory_65: Invalid Context: The contributor is declared as Deceased while in Active Service, but the recorded Age at Death exceeds the strict statutory maximum service age limit of 65 years.
err_missing_active_4m: Eligibility Denied: For active service Missing Persons, a statutory waiting period of strictly 4 months from the Police Complaint must chronologically elapse.
err_missing_retired_12m: Eligibility Denied: For retired Missing Persons, a statutory waiting period of strictly 12 months from the Police Complaint must chronologically elapse.
msg_appointee_gt_45: Appointee is strictly >45 years. Requires Cabinet/Special Approval Date.
msg_no_approval_invalid: If no approval is obtained, this constitutes an invalid appointment.
lbl_appt_permanent: Was the appointment permanent and with pension?
msg_died_terrorist: Did the contributor explicitly die due to a terrorist reason while in active service?
lbl_consent_wop: Given consent to contribute to W&OP while in Service?
opt_yes_evidence: No records, but has evidence of contribution
opt_no_reluctant: Had she given her Reluctance to contribute W&OP?
err_female_reluctant: Not Eligible for W&OP Benefits due to active reluctance recorded on file preventing valid contribution.
err_under_18: Statutory Application Voided: The individual was officially under 18 years of age at the time of specific Government Appointment. Minimum age requirements strictly breached.
err_no_cabinet_approval: Not Eligible for W&OP Benefits. The Officer was strictly >45 at appointment but failed to supply the mandatory Cabinet Special Approval Date.
err_fill_female_consent: Please fill in female consent rules.
err_not_permanent: Not Eligible for W&OP Benefits. The eligibility exists only for permanent and pensionable appointees natively, unless specifically classified as an active-service Terrorist casualty.
lbl_is_wop_reg: Is the Contributor Registered for W&OP?
err_not_reg_wop: Please Register for W&OP Membership. Contact the Employee's (Contributor's) Last Working Place.
lbl_contributions_recovered: Have contribution deductions been recovered for the complete reckonable service period?
err_contributions_unrecovered: Not Eligible for W&OP Benefits until W&OP contributions are completely recovered for the total reckonable service period.
lbl_loss_of_pension: Did the contributor's service end due to Vacation of Post / Dismissal / Resignation (Loss of Pension) prior to death?
lbl_uncountable: Uncountable Service Periods (No Pay / Half Pay)
msg_marriage_mapped_contributor: This marriage is structurally mapped to the deceased Contributor. Civil inputs explicitly bypassed to prevent redundant data entry.
lbl_specify_contributor: Specify the corresponding Contributor's Marriage details:
msg_data_persistently_mapped: Data persistently mapped from Contributor Marriage 1.
msg_warning_marriage_after_ret: Warning: This marriage logically occurred *after* the contributor's retirement date
lbl_current_legal_status: Current Legal Marriage Status / Termination Method
msg_sep_warning: Warning: Separation does not legally terminate the marriage timeline! It is deemed an active negative condition that explicitly requires Director General Special Approval and forcibly blocks subsequent lawful marriages.
lbl_apply_50_wop: Did they formally apply for the 50% W&OP pension before 2014.12.31?
lbl_no_children: No. of Children Born to this Marriage
lbl_child_disabled: Child is Permanently Disabled (Incapable of supporting oneself)
lbl_child_dis_before_26: Disability occurred natively since birth or strictly prior to completing age 26
lbl_child_health_307: Produced to Medical Board via Health 307 Report
lbl_child_med_board: Examined & Certified by the Main Medical Board
msg_dg_approval_needed: One or more marriages failed to complete a 1-year duration and yielded no children. Special approval from the Director General of Pensions must be obtained and validated to render eligibility.
err_no_wop_benefit: Sorry, No W&OP benefit for the Spouse! The contributor is documented as strictly holding zero legal marriages.
err_fatal_marriage_post_ret: Marriage fundamentally occurred post-retirement. Spouses legally married after the contributor's retirement are strictly ineligible for W&OP.
lbl_which_marriage_connects: Which of these specific marriages logically connects to the deceased Contributor?
lbl_applicant_engaged_another_marriage: Has the final Applicant engaged in another legal marriage following the death of the Contributor?
msg_no_eligible_orphans: No legally eligible orphans computationally map to this framework.
msg_warning_validating_remarriage: Warning: Validating Remarriage will statutorily deduct the final Widow/Widower payload strictly by 50% from this date forward.
err_applicant_marriage_post_ret: Applicant Marriage fundamentally occurred post-retirement. Ineligible for W&OP.
err_applicant_remarried_no_50: Eligibility Denied: Applicant remarried prior to 2010.08.17 but failed to statutorily apply for the 50% pension before the deadline of 2014.12.31.
err_divorced_from_contributor: Eligibility Denied: Documented divorce from Contributor prior to demise. (Note: Valid associated orphans explicitly maintain 100% respective eligibility).
err_format_red_fields: Format Error: Please review the RED bordered fields to resolve structural errors before submitting.
msg_no_disabled_orphans: No Valid Disabled Orphans systematically detected in the data stream.
section_f_disabled_eval_title: Section F: Disabled Orphans Financial Profiling
msg_disabled_statutory_mandates: Statutory mandates require absolute validation regarding independent income streams generated by adult disabled orphans claiming Lifetime Extensions.
lbl_disabled_possess_income: Does this dependent personally possess independent earning capacity, direct income sources, or income-generating assets?
lbl_provide_absolute_details: Provide Absolute Details & Sources governing the Financial Capacity
ph_list_specific_assets: List specific bank assets, property revenue, independent business holdings, etc.
msg_warning_independent_assets: Warning: The explicit presence of independent assets overrides automatic pension deployment, forcing rigorous physical Verification & Absolute Approval routing directly administered structurally bypassing standard logic flows through the Director General.
err_financial_dec_required: Financial Declarations Required: Please explicitly document the nature of the assets for any Disabled Dependent tagged with Independent Generating Capacity.
msg_docs_desc: Based on the specified profile, the following documents must be visually verified and validated. All birth/marriage/death certificates must be certified originals from the Additional/District Registrar.
msg_discrepancy_desc: If any name/dates or any other information discrepancies exist among documents, affidavit(s) must be submitted along with other documents declaring that those discrepancies belong to the single person.
lbl_affidavit_provided: Affidavit(s) verifying discrepancies has been officially submitted and validated.
msg_ineligibility_desc: The system has determined the requested inputs do not satisfy statutory W&OP requirements.
msg_rejection_trigger_info: If this rejection was triggered by accidental typographical errors across earlier input paths, please use the Back button to dynamically restructure the dates/properties correctly.
msg_validations_completed: Based on the Provided Information, Validations have completed successfully.
msg_no_eligible_desc: The primary legal spouse is deceased and there are no valid eligible orphans to inherit the pension.
msg_primary_deceased: The primary legal spouse is deceased.
msg_primary_remarried: The primary legal spouse has remarried.
msg_primary_abandoned: The primary legal spouse has abandoned care of orphans.
msg_total_routes_sole: The total pension routes to the sole eligible orphan.
msg_total_routes_multiple: The total pension routes to eligible orphans distributed equally
msg_note_revert_50: Note: Once all orphan eligibility expires, the remarried spouse may formally request reversion at 50%.
msg_note_revert_100: Note: Once all orphan eligibility expires, the spouse may formally request reversion at 100%.
msg_remarried_desc: The applicant widow/widower has remarried. No eligible orphans exist to receive the pension. Remarriage penalty reduces the entitlement to 50% of the original pension.
msg_spouse_50_desc: Primary widow(er) maintains their strict 50% legal entitlement.
msg_prior_orphans_desc: The remaining 50% distributes equally among valid orphans originating from prior legally terminated marriages.
msg_spouse_100_desc: Primary widow(er) legally maintains absolute routing of the W&OP payload. Orphans from this current marriage are maintained by the spouse.
msg_dg_approval_conditions: The following conditions structurally necessitate Special Approval from the DG of Pensions dynamically bypassing general eligibility scopes:
msg_missing_docs_desc: Logical Eligibility Status Achieved, but it is strictly mandatory to produce the relevant missing documents to claim the benefits:
msg_affidavit_supplied: Note: Affidavit supplied covering noted discrepancies.
msg_no_beneficiaries_identified: No eligible beneficiaries identified. Primary spouse is deceased and no valid orphans exist.
msg_no_prior_orphans: No eligible orphans from prior marriages.
lbl_wop_pensions_division: W&OP Pensions Division — Department of Pensions
msg_pension_not_commenced_note: Note: Pension payments had NOT commenced prior to demise.
lbl_discrepancy_affidavits_validated: ✓ Discrepancy Affidavit(s) have been submitted and validated.
msg_report_auto_generated: This report is auto-generated by the W&OP Eligibility Engine. This output serves as guidance only and does not constitute an official pension award. All information must be independently verified by the W&OP Pensions Division.
msg_death_gratuity_warning_gt5: Statutory Directive: Contributor died in active service with >= 5 years reckonable service. Eligible for Death Gratuity. The Last Working Place MUST formally submit a PD 05 application alongside this W&OP (PD 04). W&OP payments strictly commence only after Death Gratuity is settled.
msg_death_gratuity_warning_lt5: Statutory Directive: Contributor died in active service with < 5 years reckonable service. Only W&OP benefits are eligible. Death Gratuity does not apply.
msg_auth_warning_public: As a General Public user, this portal provides logical eligibility checking only. To formally claim benefits, please physically submit the required documents to the Divisional Secretariat (if Deceased was a pensioner) or the Last Working Place (if Deceased in active service).
msg_auth_warning_divsec_not_pensioner: Authorization Block: Legal applications for Contributors who deceased PRIOR to retirement must theoretically be initiated and formally submitted by their Last Working Place, not through a Divisional Secretariat branch.
msg_auth_warning_workingplace_pensioner: Authorization Block: Legal applications for Contributors who deceased AS PENSIONERS must computationally be processed, validated, and submitted by the relevant Divisional Secretariat, not the Last Working Place.
msg_auth_warning_divsec_pension_not_comm: Authorization Block: Because pension payments had not commenced prior to demise, the Last Working Place must submit the PD 03 application for Heirs' Payments. You are blocked from completing this application directly.
msg_auth_warning_workingplace_pension_no: Mandatory Directive: As pension payments had not commenced, you must submit a PD 03 application to the Centralised Pensions Division for Heirs' payments. This W&OP (PD 04) application must be forwarded alongside it.
msg_auth_warning_headoffice: Head Office Administrative Mode active: Direct Central Authorization and Auditing overrides enabled.
msg_dg_approval_missing_person: Statutory Protocol: The Contributor is a declared Missing Person. Special Director General Approval is formally mandated under current regulatory frameworks.
msg_dg_approval_marriage_duration: Marriage {index}: Active duration falls strictly below the mandatory 1-year threshold devoid of biological offspring.
msg_dg_approval_financial_alert: Dependent Financial Alert (Proxy ID: {id}): Independent generating assets documented necessitating formal evaluation.
msg_disabled_deferred: Medical board decision validated on {date}. Pension eligibility and payments will formally commence ONLY upon the demise, remarriage, or legal abandonment by the surviving primary spouse.
err_child_dob_after_dod: Child DOB cannot be logically after the Contributor's Date of Death.
err_child_dob_after_dod_male: Child DOB cannot be logically after 300 days of the Contributor's Date of Death.
doc_bank_account: Certified copy/copies of all eligible individuals/nominated a guardian (if any) personal individual savings bank account
doc_gn_disabled_report: Grama Niladhari's report on eligible individual's employment, income and income sources / properties (only for disabled orphans), Civil Status
doc_widow_7: If prior marriage's information cannot be retrieved: 'Widow 7' declaration (Divisional Secretariat or Pension Dept. Website)
lbl_retired_due_to_terrorism: Retired due to Disability from Terrorist Activities?
err_military_consent_missing: Please provide the W&OP Contribution Consent Date
err_military_consent_late_regular: Regular Force W&OP: Consent date exceeds the 30 June 2006 statutory deadline. Ineligible.
err_military_consent_late_volunteer: Volunteer Force W&OP: Consent date exceeds the 31 December 2012 statutory deadline. Ineligible.
msg_temporary_hold_desc: If multiple orphans are eligible, the disabled orphan's pension portion will be placed on a temporary hold when they reach 26 years of age, provided there are other eligible siblings under 26. During this hold, their portion is equally distributed among the eligible younger siblings. Once all other siblings lose eligibility (reach age 26 or gain employment), the disabled orphan's lifetime pension will automatically resume at 100%.
msg_overpayment_recovery_note: Statutory Recovery Required: The overpaid pension amount must be recovered before W&OP commencement per established regulatory procedures.
err_officer_number_required: Officer/Soldier Number is mandatory for Military/Tri-Forces contributors.
lbl_unregistered_info: Unregistered / Customary Marriage – Additional Evidence Required
msg_unregistered_rule: An unregistered marriage may be considered valid for W&OP purposes ONLY IF: (a) there is no prior subsisting marriage, or (b) all prior marriages have been legally terminated. Sufficient evidence must be submitted to substantiate the marriage.
opt_evidence_electoral: Extract of Electoral Registry showing joint residence
opt_evidence_birth_cert: Birth Certificate(s) of children born to this marriage
opt_evidence_affidavit: Sworn Affidavit by the couple or witnesses
opt_evidence_institution: Confirmation letter from officiating institution (Church / Kovil / Mosque)
opt_evidence_witnesses: Affidavits from witnesses who participated in the marriage ceremony
msg_unregistered_dg_note: ⚠ Note: Unregistered marriages require Director General (DG) approval before W&OP benefits can be formally granted.
err_last_pension_before_retirement: Last pension payment date cannot be before the retirement date.
err_dor_required: Retirement date is required for a pensioner.
err_service_category_required: Please select Regular Force or Volunteer Force.
err_last_pension_required: Last pension payment date is required.
